arabic_text:
تجاذب القطبین
شمال
جنوب
مشرق
مغرب
english_text:
Attraction of the Two Poles
North
South
East
West
TOP
BOTTOM
alt_text: A 3D cosmological diagram of a swirling disk/whirlpool seen at an angle. The rim is labeled with the four cardinal compass directions in English (NORTH, EAST, SOUTH, WEST) plus Arabic equivalents (شمال, جنوب, مشرق, مغرب), with TOP and BOTTOM marking the vertical axis. The title 'تجاذب القطبین' (Attraction of the Two Poles) appears at the top. A red labelled cube at the bottom highlights the polar-attraction detail.
notes: Cosmological model illustrating how the two poles attract along the vertical axis, set against the four cardinal directions of the cosmic disk.
